reason: The bilingual first-screen content and workflow now reflect the complete quality, release-state and public-surface capability from the consumer point of view, with a reproducible DeepWheel Brand Apply generation contract.

terminal_user.en: A Skill builder or maintainer deciding whether another person can install, understand and trust the Skill.
terminal_user.zh-CN: 准备判断一个 Skill 能否让别人顺利安装、看懂并信任的开发者或维护者。

use_scenario.en: Before installation or public release, review quality, release state and bilingual public surfaces in one evidence-backed pass.
use_scenario.zh-CN: 在安装或公开发布前，用一次有证据的核验同时检查质量、发布状态和双语公开面。

desired_belief.en: This read-only gate finds what could break first use, keeps every release surface aligned and explains why.
desired_belief.zh-CN: 这道只读门禁能找出影响首次使用的问题，让每个发布公开面保持同步，并说明原因。

next_action.en: Run the gate, fix the highest-priority evidence-backed item, rerun, and attach the passing report to the PR.
next_action.zh-CN: 运行门禁，先修最高优先级且有证据的问题，复跑通过后把报告附到 PR。
